description:
You are a security engineer rotating an application-wide API token.

 Background already prepared by IT:
 1. File that holds the live credential  
    • Path: /home/user/secrets/api_token.txt  
    • Current contents (1 line, *do not* modify):  
      SECRET_TOKEN_DO_NOT_SHARE  
    • Present permission bits: 0644 (-rw-r--r--)  
 2. Directory into which all rotation events must be logged  
    • Path: /home/user/rotation/  
    • It is writeable by you.  
    • A log file called /home/user/rotation/credentials_rotation.log may or may not already exist.  It is OK if the file is newly created by your command.

 Required end state (these are the facts the automated grader will verify):
 1. /home/user/secrets/api_token.txt must have permission bits 0600 exactly (-rw-------).  
    • Verify with:  stat -c "%a" /home/user/secrets/api_token.txt   → 600  
 2. A single new line, and only one new line, must be appended to /home/user/rotation/credentials_rotation.log.  
    • The line must read **exactly** (case, spacing, newline):  
      2024-07-15T14:00:00Z api_token.txt PERM_SET_TO_600  
      (That is: ISO timestamp, a single <space>, the literal filename *api_token.txt*, a single <space>, the literal string *PERM_SET_TO_600*, followed by the normal newline.)  
    • Verify with:  tail -n 1 /home/user/rotation/credentials_rotation.log

 Constraints:
 • Achieve both objectives with one single shell command line (you may use shell operators such as “&&” to chain sub-commands, but everything must be issued at once).  
 • Do not alter the contents of /home/user/secrets/api_token.txt.  
 • Do not touch any other files.

 When you are done, the two verification commands shown above must produce:  
    600  
    2024-07-15T14:00:00Z api_token.txt PERM_SET_TO_600  

 That is all.  Use the shell to accomplish the rotation and log update in one go.
truth:
Initial setup before the agent starts:
 • /home/user/secrets/  (0700) exists.  
 • /home/user/secrets/api_token.txt exists, content exactly:  
   SECRET_TOKEN_DO_NOT_SHARE\n  
   File mode is 0644.  
 • /home/user/rotation/ (0700) exists.  
 • /home/user/rotation/credentials_rotation.log either does not exist or, if present, ends with a newline.  The grader will accept either case as the starting state.

 Expected state after task completion:
 • /home/user/secrets/api_token.txt retains the same single-line content but its permissions are 0600.  
 • /home/user/rotation/credentials_rotation.log exists and its final line is precisely:  
   2024-07-15T14:00:00Z api_token.txt PERM_SET_TO_600  
   (terminated by a single newline).  

 The grader will check:
 1. stat -c "%a" /home/user/secrets/api_token.txt returns 600  
 2. tail -n 1 /home/user/rotation/credentials_rotation.log returns the line above exactly.  
 3. The file /home/user/secrets/api_token.txt content is unchanged.
